notes: Solid snake implementation with proper collision detection, food spawning, high score persistence, and pause/restart states, but the score display overlaps the playfield and the eye rendering is a single centered dot rather than directional eyes, minor polish issues only.
A solid and visually pleasing Snake game, but game speed is tied to monitor refresh rate (no delta time) and rapid keystrokes can be dropped due to the lack of an input queue.

A solid and mostly complete Snake implementation with working start/pause/restart and movement, but the title screen still renders the snake/food behind the overlay, the head visual is crude, and movement timing is somewhat clunky due to frame-count-based stepping.
